risk_if_not_implemented: Without System-Wide / Time-Correlated Audit Trail, security events may go undetected, allowing threats to persist unnoticed and increasing breach dwell time.

compensating_control_1.name: Centralized Collection of Security Event Logs
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to utilize a Security Incident Event Manager (SIEM), or similar automated tool, to support the centralized collection of security-related event logs.
compensating_control_1.justification: Centralized Collection of Security Event Logs (MON-02) provides detective monitoring capability that compensates for the absence of System-Wide / Time-Correlated Audit Trail (MON-02.7) by identifying unauthorized, anomalous, or non-compliant activity that the primary control would have prevented. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Content of Event Logs
compensating_control_2.justification: Content of Event Logs (MON-03) provides detective monitoring capability that compensates for the absence of System-Wide / Time-Correlated Audit Trail (MON-02.7) by identifying unauthorized, anomalous, or non-compliant activity that the primary control would have prevented. Given the technology-focused nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
